hook: Oats ranked. where does this actually belong?
intro: Today we are ranking Oats as a grain, per 100 grams, so you can see where it really lands.

sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 6.9 grams per 100 grams. omega 3 is absurdly strong. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 6.9 grams per 100 grams. omega 3 is absurdly strong. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 66.3 grams per 100 grams. the fibre support is genuinely impressive. for a grain, the whole fight is between stability and refinement.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 66.3 grams per 100 grams. the fibre support is genuinely impressive. for a grain, the whole fight is between stability and refinement.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 16.9 grams per 100 grams. bioavailability is kind of absurd. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 16.9 grams per 100 grams. bioavailability is kind of absurd. for a grain, fibre and glycemic behaviour do the heavy lifting.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. everything else is lackluster.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 3% DV stand out most. everything else is lackluster.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV stand out most.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 44% DV, iron at 26% DV stand out most.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: biggest pros here. contains useful beta-glucans. easy to build meals around. can support digestive regularity.

displayItems.title: contains useful beta-glucans
displayItems.explanation: Adds extra cardiovascular and satiety context beyond the base nutrient display.

displayItems.title: easy to build meals around
displayItems.explanation: Works well as a simple staple in many eating patterns.

displayItems.explanation: The overall fibre profile can be practically useful beyond the raw grams display.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: biggest cons here. contains some anti-nutrients. healthiness depends on what you add to it. not ideal for everyone digestively.

displayItems.title: contains some anti-nutrients
displayItems.explanation: Phytates may slightly reduce mineral uptake.

displayItems.title: healthiness depends on what you add to it
displayItems.explanation: Sugary toppings can shift the outcome a lot.

displayItems.title: not ideal for everyone digestively
displayItems.explanation: Some people do not tolerate oats especially well.

closing.summary: So overall, Proteins are carrying this food most, while vitamins are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
